recent_reviews.text: No one answers the phone. Sounds like i'm calling Mogadishu

We've had both our children at Jardin and have been very happy with our experience. As with many (most) daycares there has been turnover in staff and teachers, but relatively less turnover than compared to my friends' reports from other centers. Admin has been responsive with any questions or concerns. The teachers are loving and dedicated. Our children have learned a lot of Spanish and a many other skills. It is fun to have them come home and show me what they learned at school. Would certainly choose again.

We have sent both of our kids to Jardin for 3+ years and couldn't be happier with the level of care, educational support, and celebration of multiple cultures Jardin provides. The teachers are kind, welcoming, and always happy to see the children. Our oldest just started kindergarten and was well prepared from Jardin's amazing teachers.

A big reason we chose Jardin was for our children to experience multiple cultures. They not only celebrate events from multiple countries but will send a summary of why they're celebrating and always include the kids in the celebration. Our kids have learned a lot of Spanish and are able to have full conversations with their teachers.

We are very happy with Jardin and would highly recommend!
We have loved our time at Jardin for the last 2 years with our 2 kids. Wonderful teachers, curriculum, and community. ❤️ Our kids are always smiling when we pick them up at the end of the day.
